title: Hydro Flask - Water Bottle 946 ml (32 oz) - Vacuum Insulated Stainless Steel Water Bottle with Leak Proof Flex Cap and Powder Coat - Wide Mouth - Stone
features: IDEAL DRINKING TEMPERATURE: Our double-wall vacuum-insulated bottle keeps beverages cold for up to 24 hours and hot for up to 12 hours. The TempShield technology prevents condensation and heat transfer to the outside.

DURABLE WATER BOTTLE: Our eco-friendly, sturdy stainless steel bottle is perfect for any type of sport. The durable construction withstands everything life throws at it, while keeping the taste of your drink intact.

LEAK-PROOF: Our, insulated bottle is equipped with a leak-proof lid with a carrying strap. The standard opening allows for easy filling and cleaning. Compatible with wide mouth straw cap, chug cap and sip lid
DISHWASHER SAFE: Our water bottles come with a powder coating that makes cleaning a breeze. Enjoy more leisure time and less work with this convenient feature.
SATISFACTION GUARANTEED: We offer a lif etime warranty against manufacturer defects. HYDRO FLASK stands behind our durable and robust materials and is committed to high standards.
